args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --backend-family cuda-graphs --readiness performance >"$bundle_dir/stdout.txt" 2>"$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"; then
  echo 'decode-only subset build unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'compile-region:decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"
grep -q 'mixed-batch dummy runs' "$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"
printf 'fail-closed-subset\n'

set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --cache-namespace flashinfer-autotune-cache --readiness correctness >"$bundle_dir/stdout.txt" 2>"$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"; then
  echo 'kv-cache subset build unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'compile-region:kv_cache_update' "$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"
grep -q 'mixed prefill/decode warmup' "$bundle_dir/stderr.txt"
printf 'fail-closed-subset\n'
